chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1969 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case For hearing of main case 01-12-2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Abbasi, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G a/w Ahsanullah Simair, Additional Director, and Muhammad Saeed, Director, Agricultural Department. **** Muhammad Ali Chachar, Assistant Mukhtiarar (UT), Pano Akil (respondent No.11) files statement along with certain documents, taken on record and copy whereof is provided to counsel for the petitioner. Heard learned counsel for the petitioner, learned AAG and the officers in attendance. After hearing, by consent, this petition is disposed of directing the Secretary to Government of Sindh, Agriculture Department, to reassess the case of the petitioner in respect of the area claimed by the petitioner, being 06-33 acres, as available in Question No.18 of the form issued by the Government of Sindh, Agriculture Supply & Prices Department, Sindh Wheat Growers Support Programme 2025, and to release the payment within one month. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
